decisions.detail: Drift corrected: 5 Shorts were stale SCHEDULED in state but verified PUBLIC via YouTube oEmbed (HTTP 200) — v2_twist(vxP6XiJKLkg, 06-05), v2_answer(TwJNypz8c4I, 06-06), v3_hook(5e8ELVo5ARg, 06-08), v3_twist(0eDPVcgODvY, 06-10), v3_answer(y3xLIfOAPHA, 06-12). Set status=PUBLIC + actual_published_at=scheduled_at for each. Cross-checked: live voidline Studio session sitting on 5e8ELVo5ARg analytics period-since_publish.

Pipeline empty: no Shorts scheduled for next 3 days (Sun 06-14, Mon 06-15, Tue 06-16). Catalogue queue is dry beyond v3_answer (06-12) — the entire v3 Tunguska batch is now published with nothing staged behind it. Cadence target is 5 Shorts/wk (Mon/Wed/Fri/Sun) so 06-14 + 06-15 slots are already unfilled. ACTION NEEDED: render+schedule next batch (v4 topic). Also: tomorrow Sun 06-14 17:00 UTC is a long-form + Reddit-seed day per cadence, but no long-form appears scheduled — verify in tomorrow's run.

Runner was BLIND (curl scraper 0/13 blank — 'no notable delta' is a false negative). Pulled voidline Studio directly: v1_bonus_briggs = 319v, the channel's #1 Short and the FIRST to break the ~300v narrative plateau (prev best v2_twist 299, v1_twist 281). It is a question hook ('Why Did the Teetotal Captain Run?') — validates the question-hook thesis past the ceiling. Backfilled stats_log.csv 06-18 snapshot with real counts so next pulse can delta. Used 3/5 Studio HTTP actions.
v1_bonus_briggs (vZ68HlWfT-Q) was SCHEDULED in state but is PUBLIC (published on schedule 06-15, 319v). Set status=PUBLIC + actual_published_at. Same KNOWN_BAD publish-side drift as 06-13.

Untracked DRAFT in Studio not in shorts_state.json: '9 Barrels Empty — The Mary Celeste Vapor Theory' (2nd bonus Short). Needs scheduling to hold cadence — use the Briggs question-hook formula. Also: v2_hook still the old narrative cut at 6v (planned question-hook re-render never executed). Also: hourly pulse has a 5-day gap (06-13→06-18) — schedule not firing hourly.
